findings.evidence: `CubeGenerator.lean:179-217` defines only `characteristicWeight` and face weight lemmas; `rg "characteristic.*FaceExponent" CubeGenerator.lean` has no hits, while `CubeFace.lean:73` and `:104` define the unbundled exponent API and `CubeWeightRecursion.lean:117` defines the unbundled min-zero fact.
findings.fix: Add bundled lower/upper face exponent definitions on `PlumbingCube`, with `@[simp]` mk/natCast normal forms and bundled versions of the zero iff and `min ... = 0` lemma.
findings.issue: `PlumbingCube` exposes bundled weights and face-weight recursion but no bundled `characteristicLowerFaceExponent`/`characteristicUpperFaceExponent` or their zero/min facts, leaving the advertised face-exponent API unavailable on bundled generators.

summary: The bundled cube API still omits the face-exponent surface needed by the lattice-homology differential, so consumers must drop back to the unbundled `(x, S)` API.
